must_detect.matched_text: Structure: Dusim Robotics to acquire approximately 51% of Haneul Materials via a combination of secondary share purchase and primary issuance; consideration and price mechanics to be finalized post confirmatory diligence.

Regulatory: Any KFTC merger control filings (if thresholds are met) and post-closing DART reports will be made; the parties will comply with FSC/FSS guidance on fair disclosure and insider trading restrictions (FSCMA).

Regulatory: Any KFTC merger control filings (if thresholds are met) and post-closing DART reports will be made; the parties will comply with FSC/FSS guidance on fair disclosure and insider trading restrictions (FSCMA).

Regulatory: Any KFTC merger control filings (if thresholds are met) and post-closing DART reports will be made; the parties will comply with FSC/FSS guidance on fair disclosure and insider trading restrictions (FSCMA).
Governance: Dusim Robotics to nominate two directors (including one outside director) and one statutory auditor post-closing, subject to Articles of Incorporation and KRX Corporate Governance Code.
Covenants: Ordinary course of business undertakings; no dividends, share buybacks, or related-party transactions above customary thresholds without investor consent until closing.
Closing: Targeted within 120 days of signing, subject to regulatory timing; long-stop date to be set in the definitive share purchase agreement.
